_comment: Replacement for the name entry character grid (the original offers
katakana only). 19 runs of 5 characters in the SYSTEM.BIN run order;
the executable's 10x10 screen table shows run K at row K column 1-5
for K=1..9 and at row K-9 column 6-10 for K=10..19. A space means an
empty (blank, types a space) cell. Every character must map to a
single token in the insert table: native capitals/digits, single
